name: CREDIT FIX TOTAL
description_short: Directory listing the top 3 credit repair companies serving Howard Beach, NY, including Credit Saint, Ovation Credit Services, and The Credit People.
description_long:
CREDIT FIX TOTAL operates as a curated comparison platform for credit repair services in Howard Beach, New York, ranking providers based on success rates, customer reviews, and service quality. The site aggregates information about established credit repair companies operating in the region, presenting them alongside verified metrics like BBB ratings, years of experience, and customer satisfaction scores.

The platform features three prominently ranked credit repair providers: Credit Saint (18 years experience, 88% success rate, A+ BBB), Ovation Credit Services (18 years experience, 85% success rate, A+ BBB), and The Credit People (21 years experience, 80% success rate, A- BBB). Each listing includes specific services offered, contact information, physical addresses, and quality scores derived from the site's comprehensive evaluation system. Services highlighted across these providers include credit report dispute handling, credit monitoring, debt validation, creditor negotiations, and credit score optimization.

The site distinguishes itself by providing localized FAQ content specific to Howard Beach and New York State regulations, including information about typical service costs ($75-$200/month plus setup fees), verification methods for legitimate providers, New York compliance requirements, and expected timelines for credit repair (3-6 months). The directory includes educational content about the New York Credit Services Act and guidance on avoiding predatory services that make unrealistic promises.

A significant caveat is that this is a directory/comparison site rather than a credit repair company offering direct services. The accuracy and currency of the ranked companies' information, ratings, and success rates depend on how frequently the directory updates its data. Users must independently verify all claims and independently contact providers to confirm current services, pricing, and licensing status.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Ranks companies by multiple objective metrics including BBB ratings, success rates, years of experience, and customer review counts
Provides New York State-specific regulatory information including compliance requirements under the New York Credit Services Act
Includes detailed FAQ section addressing common Howard Beach consumer questions about costs, timelines, and local creditors
Lists specific services offered by each ranked provider (dispute handling, credit monitoring, debt validation, creditor negotiations)
Requires companies to have verifiable contact information and physical addresses (not offshore operations)
Includes quality scores for each company ranked on a 100-point scale
Educates consumers about red flags and unrealistic promises from illegitimate providers
cons: Directory model means CREDIT FIX TOTAL itself does not provide credit repair services—users must engage third-party companies
No transparent disclosure of how companies are selected for ranking or if there are paid placements/sponsored listings
Website content appears incomplete (FAQ section cuts off mid-answer without full information on free alternatives)
No clear update frequency disclosed—company information, ratings, and success rates may be outdated
Limited transparency on whether listed companies' claims (success rates, customer counts) are independently verified or self-reported
best_for: Howard Beach, NY residents seeking to compare multiple established credit repair providers in one location
Consumers unfamiliar with New York State credit repair regulations and seeking educational context
People wanting to evaluate credit repair companies by BBB rating, experience level, and success rate metrics
diagnosis: CREDIT FIX TOTAL is a directory/comparison tool, not a direct service provider. It is best for Howard Beach residents who want to research and compare multiple credit repair companies side-by-side using objective metrics like BBB ratings and success rates. The main caveat is that all actual credit repair services are provided by third-party companies listed on the site, and users must independently verify current credentials, pricing, and regulatory compliance before engaging any provider.
services: Credit report dispute letter preparation and submission
Removal of inaccuracies from credit reports
Money-back guarantees (offered by some ranked providers)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
